screen.reccheck.help.title: How to connect to OBS
screen.reccheck.help.body:
1. Start OBS Studio
2. Open OBS: Tools -> obs-websocket settings
3. Turn on the WebSocket server
4. Set a password if you want
5. Check the displayed port number
6. Enter the host, port, and password in this mod's settings
7. Press the Connection Test button
8. Save once it passes

Common failures:
- OBS is not running
- WebSocket is disabled
- Wrong port number
- Wrong password
- The host is not localhost when OBS is on the same PC

Test result colors:
- Green: connected
- Yellow: connecting / reconnecting
- Red: authentication failed
- Orange: OBS unavailable or wrong port is likely

Tip:
- If OBS is on this PC, the host should usually be localhost
- If you get stuck, go through the steps in order
